blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,924 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.0" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
